scenarios.name: Authenticate once and reuse session across tests
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses a setup project with testMatch /.*\.setup\.ts/, page.context().storageState({ path }), and dependent project storageState + dependencies: ['setup']; baseline falls back to globalSetup or per-test login and misses the project-dependency pattern.

scenarios.name: Mock /api/projects 500 to assert error UI
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses page.route('**/api/projects', route.fulfill({ status: 500, contentType, body })) and asserts the failure text via getByText; baseline mocks more loosely and misses contentType/body shape.
